summary: Iteration 3: Completed comprehensive testing of Rooms REST + WebSocket presence feature. All 67 tests passed (49 regression + 18 new). Rooms CRUD endpoints work correctly, WebSocket handshake/presence/reactions/now_playing all functional.

minor.issue: WebSocket via external URL returns HTTP 502 (Kubernetes ingress doesn't support WS). Works via internal ws://localhost:8001
minor.priority: LOW - infrastructure issue, not code bug

critical_code_review_comments: Room code generation uses secrets.choice for cryptographic randomness - good
Room code uniqueness enforced via MongoDB unique index + retry loop in code
WebSocket connection manager is in-memory (per-worker) - acceptable for MVP, needs Redis pub-sub for multi-worker prod
WebSocket handshake validates user field presence and closes with 4000 on invalid hello
now_playing updates both broadcast to members AND persist to MongoDB
Room lookup is case-insensitive via .upper() normalization
MongoDB indexes: rooms.code unique + rooms.last_active_at -1 for efficient queries
seed_data_creation: Test rooms created during testing (no TTL, will persist). Room codes are unique 6-char alphanumeric uppercase.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 67 backend tests passing. WebSocket tests use internal URL (ws://localhost:8001) because external URL doesn't support WS (HTTP 502). New test file test_rooms_ws.py covers rooms REST + WebSocket features.

rooms_rest_endpoints.POST /api/rooms: PASS - creates room with 6-char alphanumeric uppercase code, returns full room object
rooms_rest_endpoints.POST /api/rooms validation: PASS - missing name returns 422, missing host_id returns 422
rooms_rest_endpoints.room_code_uniqueness: PASS - 3 rooms created all have distinct codes
rooms_rest_endpoints.GET /api/rooms: PASS - returns {rooms: [...]} sorted by last_active_at desc
rooms_rest_endpoints.GET /api/rooms/{code}: PASS - returns room, case insensitive lookup

websocket_presence.hello_handshake: PASS - send {type:'hello', user:{id,name,avatar}}, receive {type:'room_state', room, track, members}
websocket_presence.member_joined: PASS - when A joins, B receives {type:'member_joined', member:{id,name,avatar}}
websocket_presence.member_left: PASS - when A disconnects, B receives {type:'member_left', id:A.id}
websocket_presence.reaction_broadcast: PASS - A sends {type:'reaction', emoji:'🔥'}, B receives {type:'reaction', emoji, by:{id,name,avatar}}
websocket_presence.now_playing_broadcast: PASS - A sends {type:'now_playing', track}, B receives it, AND MongoDB room.track updated
websocket_presence.live_count: PASS - GET /api/rooms/{code} shows live_count reflecting WS connections

mongodb_indexes.rooms.last_active_at_desc: PASS - -1 index exists for efficient sorting

websocket_note: WebSocket tests use internal URL (ws://localhost:8001) because external URL returns HTTP 502 from Kubernetes ingress. This is an infrastructure limitation, not a code bug. Mobile clients connecting via external URL will need ingress WebSocket support configured.
